content:
(Sorry for the topic title, don't know what I meant by "Rust Kernel" XD)
Hey! I was trying to tinker with a part of rust subsystem. I was looking for something related to ftrace, but I couldn't find any module specifically for it. I'm curious if someone else has already worked on this. I've checked the LKML and PRs in the Rust-for-linux repository, but I didn't see anything related to what I need.

I'm specifically looking for these functions because I want to hook some syscalls with ftrace:

  • kallsyms_lookup_name()
  • register_ftrace_function()
  • unregister_ftrace_function()
  • ftrace_set_filter_ip()

I'm finding it a bit confusing because everything seems to be in a draft stage, and I can't see the final result like a source tree. The only sources I can view are on this website: https://rust-for-linux.github.io/docs/kernel/, which isn't that easy to navigate through, honestly.

I'd really appreciate any help or tips you might have. I'm excited to write the wrapper part for ftrace. Any suggestions?
